Python Full-Stack Engineer · AI Solutions Architect
Enterprise knowledge bases, document intelligence, domestic IM/Lark ecosystems, and production-grade RAG delivery

/api/v1 command dispatch, progress polling & album media import

rows.title: Document Intelligence

items.title: PDF2XML Parser
items.subtitle: PDFlib TET · FastAPI
items.description: High-precision PDF text, table, and font-geometry parsing to structured output — foundation for downstream chunking and retrieval.

items.title: Smart PDF Chunking
items.subtitle: Report / filing modes
items.description: Smart chunking for report and filing PDFs: ruled/stateless table detection with Markdown output, preserving document structure.

items.title: Report Watermark Removal
items.subtitle: Multi-rule templates
items.description: Batch watermark removal via configurable font/keyword/position rules, improving downstream OCR and chunking quality.

items.title: PaddleOCR-VL Service
items.subtitle: Upload & parse
items.description: Upload PDFs or images for OCR and layout understanding via FastAPI — for scans, image filings, and other weak-text sources.

items.title: PDF TOC Mining Service
items.subtitle: Three-tier fallback
items.description: Extract TOC from research PDFs: bookmarks first, then TOC page parsing, then layout analysis as fallback.

items.title: GPU Layout Detection API
items.subtitle: High concurrency
items.description: Layout element detection on document images — titles, paragraphs, figures — with sync response and async persistence for downstream chunking/OCR.

innovation.title: Technical Philosophy
innovation.text: AI value is in production — observable, rollback-friendly, maintainable. Solid Python engineering turns models into systems that actually run in your business.

intro.title: Have an idea? Let's ship it
intro.description: Agents, RAG, document pipelines, or bots — bring your scenario. I'll assess feasibility honestly and propose a concrete path.
